settings.heading: Online apparel stores for teams, schools and organizations.
settings.lead: Simplify group ordering with Shopify-powered team stores for spirit wear, uniforms, fundraisers and employee apparel.
settings.body:
Team stores reduce paper forms, scattered payments and manual size tracking. L F Graphco can structure apparel options, deadlines, product descriptions and order collection around your organization.

Use team stores for sports teams, booster clubs, school spirit wear, staff apparel, church groups and company merch drops.
settings.features: Online Ordering,Spirit Wear,Booster Clubs,Employee Apparel,Fundraiser Stores

settings.heading: Get a team store plan before collecting orders.
settings.intro: Share your organization, products, deadline and artwork. L F Graphco can help outline the store structure and apparel options for your group.

settings.heading: Team stores can include shirts, hoodies, polos and promo products.
settings.intro: Use one quote path for screen printed spirit wear, embroidered staff apparel, full-color designs and branded giveaways.

settings.heading: Start a store for your team, school or company.
settings.intro: Tell us who the store is for, what products you want and when orders need to close.
